ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
Off Calendar Jun-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi, via ZOOM, counsel for Institute of Aging, Administrator.

The court begins by asking counsel regarding the status of this matter. Counsel reports that she has filed the documents she said that she would at the previous hearing date set in this matter.

After additional discussion, the First and Final Account and Report is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
Off Calendar Apr-06-2021 Continued To May-18-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Avid Alavi, via ZOOM, counsel for Institute of Aging, Petitioner.

Court advises Ms. Alavi that the court's concern with regard the request to reimburse Wilton Woo are based on information and belief and it seems that the request would benefit from a development of the record. Ms. Alavi advises the court that she has done her best to provide the court with all of the information that she has been able to obtain. Ms. Alavi advises that Mr. Woo has been unable to provide pertinent information which is likely due to his obstructionist personality. Ms. Alavi advises that property taxes for the properties in Los Angeles and Kern county have been paid however, it is unclear as to whom has been paying them. The court queries Ms. Alavi as to what the current plan is to close the estate. Ms. Alavi advises that as soon as the vacant lots in Los Angeles county are currently on the market to be sold and that as soon as they are sold, an accounting and final distribution will be prepared and submitted to the court. Ms. Alavi advises that she intends on filing the following documents: 13100 declarations from both grandsons and certified letters from the attorney handling the matter in Washington state. The court also advises that notice to Chadwick Craig Woo is proper. After further discussion, this matter is continued to MAY-18-2021 for the status of submission of the previously mentioned documents.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn; Clerk: Robert Woods; Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. Not Reported.
